ksa_text: Knowledge of data and AI operational budgeting practices, including cost allocation models, chargeback and showback frameworks, cloud cost optimization strategies, and ROI tracking for infrastructure investments.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of critical information technology (IT) procurement requirements.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of critical information technology (IT) procurement requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Operations & Program Management KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.423) to justify inclusion for the Director of AI/ML. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.423 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturn: moderate-signal Knowledge KSA in an edge domain still contributes to the role's awareness requirements. Revised to include.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.423). External validation of this knowledge KSA for the Director of AI/ML role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: PMI, TOGAF operational frameworks, and CDO survey data (NewVantage Partners) confirm operational program management as a key competency for data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Operations & Program Management for the Director of AI/ML is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Operations & Program Management knowledge KSA is relevant to the Director of AI/ML based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
